name: agent-flow-workflow-plugin
description: Open Agent Flow in VS Code Simple Browser and focus workflow panes.

commands.title: Agent Flow: Start Server and Open Workflow

agentFlow.workflowUrl.description: URL opened in VS Code Simple Browser for Agent Flow.

agentFlow.focusChatAfterOpen.description: Attempt to focus a chat view after opening the workflow browser.

agentFlow.startServerOnOpen.description: Start the local Agent Flow server command before opening the workflow URL.

agentFlow.startupWaitMs.description: Milliseconds to wait for the workflow URL to respond after starting the server command.

agentFlow.startupCommandWindows.description: Server startup command used on Windows in the Agent Flow terminal. Supports ${workspaceFolder}.

agentFlow.startupCommandUnix.description: Server startup command used on macOS/Linux in the Agent Flow terminal. Supports ${workspaceFolder}.
